creator: jarrod@downtools.com.au
text:
Oops, my apologies Sean, time has alluded me the past few weeks.  On the =
surface the change looks good but I want to get my head around the =
changes to the documentation and configuration builder first.  I=92ll =
push your updated patch in to a local tinderbox instance and will see =
what comes of that.  I hope to be able to provide some feedback later in =
the week.

Thanks for your efforts!

Cheers,
Jarrod.=
